nodes.name: 🌍 Translation Pipeline Trigger (2PM Daily)
nodes.notes: Runs 6 hours after main pipeline to allow English post to be published first.

nodes.name: 🔀 Split Into 8 Languages
nodes.notes: Creates 8 parallel translation jobs — one per language.

nodes.name: 🌐 AI: Translate + Culturally Adapt
nodes.notes: Uses Ollama llama3.2 for native translation. Supports 100+ languages natively.

nodes.name: 🔀 Route by Language
nodes.notes: Routes to language-specific WordPress installations (subdomains or multisite).

nodes.name: 🇩🇪 Publish to German Site
nodes.notes: German subdomain: de.howtogenie.com — Highest AdSense CPM!

nodes.name: 🇸🇦 Publish to Arabic Site
nodes.notes: Arabic subdomain: ar.howtogenie.com — Gulf states = high purchasing power

nodes.name: 🇯🇵 Publish to Japanese Site
nodes.notes: Japanese subdomain: ja.howtogenie.com — Highest affiliate payouts in Asia

nodes.name: 🔗 Generate Hreflang Tags
nodes.notes: Critical for international SEO. Tells Google which language versions exist.
